description: Positive modifier badges that help the player during clinical encounters. Displayed as green/blue ovals on the badge reel UI.

dispenser_rules.description: Badge Dispenser — spend 10 AP mid-encounter to draw 3 random boost badges and keep 1.

late_game.note: Unlocked through progression. Multiple draws and multiple badges become possible.

badges.name: Coffee & Rounds
badges.flavor_text: You actually slept last night. Incredible.

badges.name: Photographic Memory
badges.flavor_text: You read the chart before walking in. Revolutionary.

badges.name: Gunner
badges.description: All physical exam actions cost 1 AP instead of 2.
badges.flavor_text: Head-to-toe in 90 seconds. The attending is impressed.

badges.name: Fellow on Call
badges.flavor_text: Dr. Nguyen owes you a favor.

badges.name: Lab Whisperer
badges.description: All lab orders cost 1 AP less (minimum 1).
badges.flavor_text: You and the lab have an understanding.

badges.name: Rapid Infusion
badges.description: Your next IV medication order costs 0 AP.
badges.flavor_text: IV team was already at the bedside. Lucky.

badges.name: Second Opinion
badges.description: Reroll one probabilistic lab result once per encounter.
badges.flavor_text: The analyzer was acting up. Run it again.

badges.name: Chart Review
badges.description: Reveals one hidden history item for free.
badges.flavor_text: You actually read the old notes. Gold.

badges.name: Attending Override
badges.description: Ignore one surgery or procedure prerequisite.
badges.flavor_text: The attending says just go. Don't ask questions.

badges.name: Clinical Intuition
badges.description: Receive one free hint narrowing the diagnosis.
badges.flavor_text: You've seen this before. You just know.

badges.name: STAT Results
badges.description: Labs and imaging cost 1 AP less this encounter (minimum 1).
badges.flavor_text: You wrote STAT and meant it. So did they.

badges.name: Good Veins
badges.description: IV access established automatically at encounter start. No AP required.

badges.name: Overachiever
badges.description: Bonus points earned this encounter are worth +1 extra XP each when banked.
badges.flavor_text: You don't just do the work. You document it.
